diffs.patch:
Index: content/docs/components/logo-marquee.mdx
===================================================================
--- content/docs/components/logo-marquee.mdx	
+++ content/docs/components/logo-marquee.mdx	
@@ -0,0 +1,83 @@
+---
+title: Logo Marquee
+description: An infinite scrolling logo marquee with smooth animation and hover pause.
+---
+
+import { LogoMarqueePreview } from "@/registry/new-york/logo-marquee-demo";
+
+<ComponentPreview name="logo-marquee">
+  <LogoMarqueePreview />
+</ComponentPreview>
+
+## Installation
+
+If you've already added the prsui registry, use the short command:
+
+<CodeBlockCommand
+  __bun__="bunx --bun shadcn@latest add @prsui/logo-marquee"
+  __npm__="npx shadcn@latest add @prsui/logo-marquee"
+  __pnpm__="pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add @prsui/logo-marquee"
+  __yarn__="yarn shadcn@latest add @prsui/logo-marquee"
+/>
+
+Otherwise, use the full registry URL:
+
+<CodeBlockCommand
+  __bun__="bunx --bun shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/logo-marquee.json"
+  __npm__="npx shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/logo-marquee.json"
+  __pnpm__="pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/logo-marquee.json"
+  __yarn__="yarn shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/logo-marquee.json"
+/>
+
+## Usage
+
+After you add the component with the CLI, import it from your UI folder:
+
+```tsx
+import { LogoMarquee, type Logo } from "@/components/prsui/logo-marquee";
+
+const logos: Logo[] = [
+  {
+    alt: "Vercel",
+    src: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/simple-icons/simple-icons/develop/icons/vercel.svg",
+  },
+  {
+    alt: "Next.js",
+    src: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/simple-icons/simple-icons/develop/icons/nextdotjs.svg",
+  },
+];
+
+export function MyComponent() {
+  return <LogoMarquee logos={logos} />;
+}
+```
+
+## Props
+
+### Logo
+
+| Field    | Type     | Default  | Description            |
+| -------- | -------- | -------- | ---------------------- |
+| `src`    | `string` | -        | Image URL for the logo |
+| `alt`    | `string` | -        | Alt text for the image |
+| `width`  | `number` | `"auto"` | Optional width         |
+| `height` | `number` | `"auto"` | Optional height        |
+
+### LogoMarquee
+
+| Prop        | Type     | Default | Description                    |
+| ----------- | -------- | ------- | ------------------------------ |
+| `logos`     | `Logo[]` | -       | Array of logo objects          |
+| `className` | `string` | -       | Classes applied to the wrapper |
+
+### InfiniteSlider (internal)
+
+| Prop              | Type                         | Default        | Description                          |
+| ----------------- | ---------------------------- | -------------- | ------------------------------------ |
+| `children`        | `React.ReactNode`            | -              | Content to scroll                    |
+| `gap`             | `number`                     | `16`           | Gap between items in px              |
+| `duration`        | `number`                     | `25`           | Animation duration in seconds        |
+| `durationOnHover` | `number`                     | -              | Duration when hovered (slows down)   |
+| `direction`       | `"horizontal" \| "vertical"` | `"horizontal"` | Scroll direction                     |
+| `reverse`         | `boolean`                    | `false`        | Reverse scroll direction             |
+| `className`       | `string`                     | -              | Classes applied to the outer wrapper |

Index: registry/new-york/logo-marquee-demo.tsx =================================================================== --- registry/new-york/logo-marquee-demo.tsx +++ registry/new-york/logo-marquee-demo.tsx @@ -0,0 +1,47 @@ +"use client"; + +import { LogoMarquee } from "./logo-marquee"; +import type { Logo } from "./logo-marquee"; + +const logos: Logo[] = [ + { + alt: "Vercel", + src: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/simple-icons/simple-icons/develop/icons/vercel.svg", + }, + { + alt: "Next.js", + src: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/simple-icons/simple-icons/develop/icons/nextdotjs.svg", + }, + { + alt: "React", + src: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/simple-icons/simple-icons/develop/icons/react.svg", + }, + { + alt: "TypeScript", + src: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/simple-icons/simple-icons/develop/icons/typescript.svg", + }, + { + alt: "Tailwind CSS", + src: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/simple-icons/simple-icons/develop/icons/tailwindcss.svg", + }, + { + alt: "GitHub", + src: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/simple-icons/simple-icons/develop/icons/github.svg", + }, + { + alt: "Figma", + src: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/simple-icons/simple-icons/develop/icons/figma.svg", + }, + { + alt: "GitLab", + src: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/simple-icons/simple-icons/develop/icons/gitlab.svg", + }, +]; + +export const LogoMarqueePreview = function LogoMarqueePreview() { + return ( +
+ +
+ ); +};

27:   __npm__="npx shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/accordion.json"
28:   __pnpm__="pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/accordion.json"
29:   __yarn__="yarn shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/accordion.json"
30: />
31: 
32: ## Usage
33: 
34: After you add the component with the CLI, import it from your UI folder:
35: 
36: ```tsx
37: import { Accordion, type AccordionItem } from "@/components/ui/accordion";
38: 
39: const items: AccordionItem[] = [
40:   {
41:     id: "item-1",
42:     title: "First question",
43:     description: "Answer to the first question.",
44:   },
45:   {
46:     id: "item-2",
47:     title: "Second question",
48:     description: "Answer to the second question.",
49:   },
50: ];
51: 
52: export function MyComponent() {
53:   return <Accordion items={items} defaultValue="item-1" />;
54: }
55: ```
56: 
57: ## Props
58: 
59: | Prop            | Type                              | Default | Description                                           |
60: | --------------- | --------------------------------- | ------- | ----------------------------------------------------- |
61: | `items`         | `AccordionItem[]`                 | -       | Array of accordion items                              |
62: | `value`         | `string \| null`                  | -       | Controlled currently open item id                     |
63: | `defaultValue`  | `string \| null`                  | `null`  | Initially open item id                                |
64: | `onValueChange` | `(value: string \| null) => void` | -       | Callback fired when the open item changes             |
65: | `collapsible`   | `boolean`                         | `true`  | When false, an open item cannot be closed by clicking |
66: | `className`     | `string`                          | -       | Classes applied to the root wrapper                   |
67: | `classNames`    | `AccordionClassNames`             | -       | Override classes for individual sub-elements          |
68: 
69: ### AccordionItem
70: 
71: | Field         | Type        | Description                              |
72: | ------------- | ----------- | ---------------------------------------- |
73: | `id`          | `string`    | Unique identifier for the item           |
74: | `title`       | `ReactNode` | Content shown in the trigger row         |
75: | `description` | `ReactNode` | Content revealed when the item is open   |
76: | `icon`        | `ReactNode` | Optional icon displayed before the title |
77: | `disabled`    | `boolean`   | Disables the item                        |
78: 
79: ### AccordionClassNames
80: 
81: | Key           | Description                  |
82: | ------------- | ---------------------------- |
83: | `root`        | Wrapper around all items     |
84: | `item`        | Each accordion row container |
85: | `trigger`     | The clickable button row     |
86: | `icon`        | The icon wrapper span        |
87: | `title`       | The title text span          |
88: | `chevron`     | The chevron rotation wrapper |
89: | `content`     | The animated content wrapper |
90: | `description` | The description text div     |

---
title: Accordion
description: Animated accordion with spring physics, group morphing, and accessible ARIA attributes.
---

import { BouncyAccordionPreview } from "@/registry/new-york/accordion-demo";

<ComponentPreview name="accordion">
  <BouncyAccordionPreview />
</ComponentPreview>

## Installation

If you've already added the prsui registry, use the short command:

<CodeBlockCommand
  __bun__="bunx --bun shadcn@latest add @prsui/accordion"
  __npm__="npx shadcn@latest add @prsui/accordion"
  __pnpm__="pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add @prsui/accordion"
  __yarn__="yarn shadcn@latest add @prsui/accordion"

display.text:
---
title: Accordion
description: Animated accordion with spring physics, group morphing, and accessible ARIA attributes.
---

import { BouncyAccordionPreview } from "@/registry/new-york/accordion-demo";

<ComponentPreview name="accordion">
  <BouncyAccordionPreview />
</ComponentPreview>

## Installation

If you've already added the prsui registry, use the short command:

<CodeBlockCommand
  __bun__="bunx --bun shadcn@latest add @prsui/accordion"
  __npm__="npx shadcn@latest add @prsui/accordion"
  __pnpm__="pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add @prsui/accordion"
  __yarn__="yarn shadcn@latest add @prsui/accordion"
/>

Otherwise, use the full registry URL:

<CodeBlockCommand
  __bun__="bunx --bun shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/accordion.json"
  __npm__="npx shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/accordion.json"
  __pnpm__="pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/accordion.json"
  __yarn__="yarn shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/accordion.json"
/>

## Usage

After you add the component with the CLI, import it from your UI folder:

```tsx
import { Accordion, type AccordionItem } from "@/components/ui/accordion";

const items: AccordionItem[] = [
  {
    id: "item-1",
    title: "First question",
    description: "Answer to the first question.",
  },
  {
    id: "item-2",
    title: "Second question",
    description: "Answer to the second question.",
  },
];

export function MyComponent() {
  return <Accordion items={items} defaultValue="item-1" />;
}
```

## Props

| Prop            | Type                              | Default | Description                                           |
| --------------- | --------------------------------- | ------- | ----------------------------------------------------- |
| `items`         | `AccordionItem[]`                 | -       | Array of accordion items                              |
| `value`         | `string \| null`                  | -       | Controlled currently open item id                     |
| `defaultValue`  | `string \| null`                  | `null`  | Initially open item id                                |
| `onValueChange` | `(value: string \| null) => void` | -       | Callback fired when the open item changes             |
| `collapsible`   | `boolean`                         | `true`  | When false, an open item cannot be closed by clicking |
| `className`     | `string`                          | -       | Classes applied to the root wrapper                   |
| `classNames`    | `AccordionClassNames`             | -       | Override classes for individual sub-elements          |

### AccordionItem

| Field         | Type        | Description                              |
| ------------- | ----------- | ---------------------------------------- |
| `id`          | `string`    | Unique identifier for the item           |
| `title`       | `ReactNode` | Content shown in the trigger row         |
| `description` | `ReactNode` | Content revealed when the item is open   |
| `icon`        | `ReactNode` | Optional icon displayed before the title |
| `disabled`    | `boolean`   | Disables the item                        |

### AccordionClassNames

| Key           | Description                  |
| ------------- | ---------------------------- |
| `root`        | Wrapper around all items     |
| `item`        | Each accordion row container |
| `trigger`     | The clickable button row     |
| `icon`        | The icon wrapper span        |
| `title`       | The title text span          |
| `chevron`     | The chevron rotation wrapper |
| `content`     | The animated content wrapper |
| `description` | The description text div     |

parts.text: Now let me create the docs file following the pattern from accordion.mdx.

input.content:
---
title: Logo Marquee
description: An infinite scrolling logo marquee with smooth animation and hover pause.
---

import { LogoMarqueePreview } from "@/registry/new-york/logo-marquee-demo";

<ComponentPreview name="logo-marquee">
  <LogoMarqueePreview />
</ComponentPreview>

## Installation

If you've already added the prsui registry, use the short command:

<CodeBlockCommand
  __bun__="bunx --bun shadcn@latest add @prsui/logo-marquee"
  __npm__="npx shadcn@latest add @prsui/logo-marquee"
  __pnpm__="pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add @prsui/logo-marquee"
  __yarn__="yarn shadcn@latest add @prsui/logo-marquee"
/>

Otherwise, use the full registry URL:

<CodeBlockCommand
  __bun__="bunx --bun shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/logo-marquee.json"
  __npm__="npx shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/logo-marquee.json"
  __pnpm__="pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/logo-marquee.json"
  __yarn__="yarn shadcn@latest add https://prsui.pr5.dev/r/logo-marquee.json"
/>

## Usage

After you add the component with the CLI, import it from your UI folder:

```tsx
import { LogoMarquee, type Logo } from "@/components/prsui/logo-marquee";

const logos: Logo[] = [
  {
    alt: "Vercel",
    src: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/simple-icons/simple-icons/develop/icons/vercel.svg",
  },
  {
    alt: "Next.js",
    src: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/simple-icons/simple-icons/develop/icons/nextdotjs.svg",
  },
];

export function MyComponent() {
  return <LogoMarquee logos={logos} />;
}
```

## Props

### Logo

| Field    | Type     | Default  | Description              |
| -------- | -------- | -------- | ------------------------ |
| `src`    | `string` | -        | Image URL for the logo   |
| `alt`    | `string` | -        | Alt text for the image   |
| `width`  | `number` | `"auto"` | Optional width           |
| `height` | `number` | `"auto"` | Optional height          |

### LogoMarquee

| Prop        | Type       | Default | Description                     |
| ----------- | ---------- | ------- | ------------------------------- |
| `logos`     | `Logo[]`   | -       | Array of logo objects           |
| `className` | `string`   | -       | Classes applied to the wrapper  |

### InfiniteSlider (internal)

| Prop                | Type                              | Default    | Description                                |
| ------------------- | --------------------------------- | ---------- | ------------------------------------------ |
| `children`          | `React.ReactNode`                 | -          | Content to scroll                          |
| `gap`               | `number`                          | `16`       | Gap between items in px                    |
| `duration`          | `number`                          | `25`       | Animation duration in seconds              |
| `durationOnHover`   | `number`                          | -          | Duration when hovered (slows down)         |
| `direction`         | `"horizontal" \| "vertical"`      | `"horizontal"` | Scroll direction                      |
| `reverse`           | `boolean`                         | `false`    | Reverse scroll direction                   |
| `className`         | `string`                          | -          | Classes applied to the outer wrapper       |
